THEREFORE, IT IS ORDERED THAT THE JUDGMENT ENTERED IN THE MUNICIPAL COURT IS HEREBY AFFIRMED. PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 1034 AND CRC 135 A, B & C, COSTS ARE HEREBY AWARDED TO THE PREVAI- LING PARTY.
